name: cloud-doc-editing
description: 云文档读取、编辑、权限、版本与回写确认边界的最小可安装技能示例。

scripts.check: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const s=fs.readFileSync('SKILL.md','utf8'); if(!s.startsWith('---\n')) throw new Error('SKILL.md 缺少 YAML front matter'); const end=s.indexOf('\n---',4); if(end<0) throw new Error('SKILL.md YAML front matter 未闭合'); console.log('cloud-doc-editing skill package ok');"
